note: Interop target = public_canonical_artifact_hash (serialization-independent). full_artifact_hash is over the exact bytes of fixture_artifact.json (json indent=2). public_canonical_artifact_bytes is the exact string that gets SHA-256ed; diff against your TS canonicalizer output before comparing hashes.
canonicalization_notes: Dropped config.key_file and config.out. Pinned agg numbers per benchmark-result-public-v0.1 (success_rate=1dp, avg_cost_usd=4dp, avg_latency_s=2dp, avg_tokens=int, runs=int). Canonical artifact = config (minus those two) + agg; runs[] left out (v0.1 doesn't specify it). Keys sorted, no extra whitespace, UTF-8/ASCII. NaN/Inf rejected, -0 -> 0.
